title: Recognise trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Recognise trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Examine tree features

pcs.text: Confirm the location and range of trees to be recognised with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the location and range of trees to be recognised with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the location and range of trees to be recognised with supervisor.

pcs.text: Examine and record the morphological characteristics of tree specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine and record the morphological characteristics of tree specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine and record the morphological characteristics of tree specimens.

pcs.text: Examine and record the tactile and sensory characteristics of tree specimens
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine and record the tactile and sensory characteristics of tree specimens?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine and record the tactile and sensory characteristics of tree specimens.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Examine tree features

elements.title: Examine tree condition

pcs.text: Examine tree for general condition of health and vigour
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine tree for general condition of health and vigour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine tree for general condition of health and vigour.

pcs.text: Record condition of tree health, noting signs and symptoms of tree disorders, and report to supervisor according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record condition of tree health, noting signs and symptoms of tree disorders, and report to supervisor according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record condition of tree health, noting signs and symptoms of tree disorders, and report to supervisor according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Examine tree condition

elements.title: Recognise tree

pcs.text: Use reference material to compare plant specimen characteristics to assist in tree recognition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use reference material to compare plant specimen characteristics to assist in tree recognition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use reference material to compare plant specimen characteristics to assist in tree recognition.

pcs.text: Recognise tree by common name and botanical name
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise tree by common name and botanical name?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise tree by common name and botanical name.

pcs.text: Confirm accuracy of tree recognition with work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm accuracy of tree recognition with work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm accuracy of tree recognition with work team.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Recognise tree

elements.title: Recognise tree benefits

pcs.text: Examine tree for ecological habitat for localised biota
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine tree for ecological habitat for localised biota?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine tree for ecological habitat for localised biota.

pcs.text: Recognise localised ecological and environmental benefits provided by tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise localised ecological and environmental benefits provided by tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise localised ecological and environmental benefits provided by tree.

pcs.text: Recognise social benefits and value of tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise social benefits and value of tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise social benefits and value of tree.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Recognise tree benefits

elements.title: Report on results

pcs.text: Record key features observed in the process of tree recognition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record key features observed in the process of tree recognition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record key features observed in the process of tree recognition.

pcs.text: Inform client of tree recognition process according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform client of tree recognition process according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform client of tree recognition process according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Report on results

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
